mapper.sql: t.id, t.domain, t.short_uri, t.full_short_url, t.origin_url, t.click_num, t.gid, t.favicon, t.enable_status, t.created_type, t.valid_date_type, t.valid_date, t.`describe`, t.total_pv, t.total_uv, t.total_uip, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.del_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT , COALESCE(s.today_pv, 0) AS todayPv, COALESCE(s.today_uv, 0) AS todayUv, COALESCE(s.today_uip, 0) AS todayUip FROM t_link t LEFT JOIN ( /* 今日聚合子查询：先按 full_short_url 汇总，再连接 */ SELECT full_short_url, SUM(pv) AS today_pv, SUM(uv) AS today_uv, SUM(uip) AS today_uip FROM t_link_access_stats WHERE date = CURDATE() GROUP BY full_short_url ) s ON t.full_short_url = s.full_short_url
WHERE t.gid = #{gid} AND t.enable_status = 0 AND t.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY todayPv DESC
ORDER BY todayUv DESC
ORDER BY todayUip DESC
ORDER BY t.total_pv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uip DESC
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
